input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>Large white 3D letters float in a blue space, initially scattered and angled in various directions. They rapidly assemble and align to form a coherent logo structure. The text "AQUAGUARD" appears at the top, with "ENHANCE" positioned below it on the left and a large "UV" situated on the right side. The background remains a gradient blue with a light source at the top.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: Describe the sequence of product displays and text overlays shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins with scattered white 3D letters assembling into a logo against a blue gradient. Next, similar block letters form a large number six beside the word "STAGE." Finally, the scene shifts to pale, spiky spherical models and a large organism floating in light blue space. The text "PROTOZOA" appears in bold, dark blue capital letters near the top left, labeling these microscopic entities as they suspend and drift within the environment.

Following the Protozoa sequence, the microscopic scene vanishes, replaced by a dark blue gradient background. White text then assembles vertically in the center, displaying "PROTECTION FROM" in small capitals, followed by "NEW AGE" in a larger font, and concluding with "CONTAMINANTS" in the largest bold capitals at the bottom.

Following the contaminant text, large white 3D letters spelling "LEAD" dominate the foreground amidst floating grey metallic rock fragments. The previous message fades into the background behind this new typography. A reflection of the word "LEAD" is visible below on a glossy surface, while the scene maintains its blue gradient backdrop as these heavy, industrial-looking elements assemble to conclude the sequence.

After the lead sequence, the text changes to "PESTICIDES," accompanied by a pink and green worm-like model and dark pill-shaped objects. Finally, the scene shifts to display the word "ARSNIC" flanked by rough mineral chunks, one pinkish and one blue-grey. Both final segments feature reversed text reflections on a glossy surface against the consistent blue gradient background, concluding the visual presentation.

This clears for a "SPECIAL FEATURES" title card, which then reduces to just "FEATURES" with receding 3D blocks. Finally, the video showcases a white and grey appliance; the word "ENHANCE" appears on its casing near a glowing blue light, before zooming in on the silver tap above the "Aquaguard" logo on a black panel.</answer>

queries.question: Describe the sequence of product displays and text overlays shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins with scattered white 3D letters assembling into a logo against a blue gradient. Next, similar block letters form a large number six beside the word "STAGE." Finally, the scene shifts to pale, spiky spherical models and a large organism floating in light blue space. The text "PROTOZOA" appears in bold, dark blue capital letters near the top left, labeling these microscopic entities as they suspend and drift within the environment.

Following the Protozoa sequence, the microscopic scene vanishes, replaced by a dark blue gradient background. White text then assembles vertically in the center, displaying "PROTECTION FROM" in small capitals, followed by "NEW AGE" in a larger font, and concluding with "CONTAMINANTS" in the largest bold capitals at the bottom.

Following the contaminant text, large white 3D letters spelling "LEAD" dominate the foreground amidst floating grey metallic rock fragments. The previous message fades into the background behind this new typography. A reflection of the word "LEAD" is visible below on a glossy surface, while the scene maintains its blue gradient backdrop as these heavy, industrial-looking elements assemble to conclude the sequence.

After the lead sequence, the text changes to "PESTICIDES," accompanied by a pink and green worm-like model and dark pill-shaped objects. Finally, the scene shifts to display the word "ARSNIC" flanked by rough mineral chunks, one pinkish and one blue-grey. Both final segments feature reversed text reflections on a glossy surface against the consistent blue gradient background, concluding the visual presentation.

Following the arsenic sequence, the text shifts to "MERCURY" beside a dark jagged rock and yellow spiky sphere. This clears for a "SPECIAL FEATURES" title card, which then reduces to just "FEATURES" with receding 3D blocks. Finally, the video showcases a white and grey appliance; the word "ENHANCE" appears on its casing near a glowing blue light, before zooming in on the silver tap above the "Aquaguard" logo on a black panel.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of product displays and text overlays shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins with scattered white 3D letters assembling into a logo against a blue gradient. Next, similar block letters form a large number six beside the word "STAGE." Finally, the scene shifts to pale, spiky spherical models and a large organism floating in light blue space. The text "PROTOZOA" appears in bold, dark blue capital letters near the top left, labeling these microscopic entities as they suspend and drift within the environment.

Following the Protozoa sequence, the microscopic scene vanishes, replaced by a dark blue gradient background. White text then assembles vertically in the center, displaying "PROTECTION FROM" in small capitals, followed by "NEW AGE" in a larger font, and concluding with "CONTAMINANTS" in the largest bold capitals at the bottom.

Following the contaminant text, large white 3D letters spelling "LEAD" dominate the foreground amidst floating grey metallic rock fragments. The previous message fades into the background behind this new typography. A reflection of the word "LEAD" is visible below on a glossy surface, while the scene maintains its blue gradient backdrop as these heavy, industrial-looking elements assemble to conclude the sequence.

After the lead sequence, the text changes to "PESTICIDES," accompanied by a pink and green worm-like model and dark pill-shaped objects. Finally, the scene shifts to display the word "ARSNIC" flanked by rough mineral chunks, one pinkish and one blue-grey. Both final segments feature reversed text reflections on a glossy surface against the consistent blue gradient background, concluding the visual presentation.

Following the arsenic sequence, the text shifts to "MERCURY" beside a dark jagged rock and yellow spiky sphere. This clears for a "SPECIAL FEATURES" title card, which then reduces to just "FEATURES" with receding 3D blocks. Finally, the video showcases a white and grey appliance; the word "ENHANCE" appears on its casing near a glowing blue light, before zooming in on the silver tap above the "Aquaguard" logo on a black panel.

samples.output: <think>The stationary white and dark grey water purifier with visible internal filters remains centered against a blue background. To the right, the large white text overlay changes; "THE SMA" appears on the far left while the letters "TRES" persist on the far right, replacing the previous "8 LITRES" caption.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: Describe the sequence of product displays and text overlays shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins with scattered white 3D letters assembling into a logo against a blue gradient. Next, similar block letters form a large number six beside the word "STAGE." Finally, the scene shifts to pale, spiky spherical models and a large organism floating in light blue space. The text "PROTOZOA" appears in bold, dark blue capital letters near the top left, labeling these microscopic entities as they suspend and drift within the environment.

Following the Protozoa sequence, the microscopic scene vanishes, replaced by a dark blue gradient background. White text then assembles vertically in the center, displaying "PROTECTION FROM" in small capitals, followed by "NEW AGE" in a larger font, and concluding with "CONTAMINANTS" in the largest bold capitals at the bottom.

Following the contaminant text, large white 3D letters spelling "LEAD" dominate the foreground amidst floating grey metallic rock fragments. The previous message fades into the background behind this new typography. A reflection of the word "LEAD" is visible below on a glossy surface, while the scene maintains its blue gradient backdrop as these heavy, industrial-looking elements assemble to conclude the sequence.

After the lead sequence, the text changes to "PESTICIDES," accompanied by a pink and green worm-like model and dark pill-shaped objects. Finally, the scene shifts to display the word "ARSNIC" flanked by rough mineral chunks, one pinkish and one blue-grey. Both final segments feature reversed text reflections on a glossy surface against the consistent blue gradient background, concluding the visual presentation.

Following the arsenic sequence, the text shifts to "MERCURY" beside a dark jagged rock and yellow spiky sphere. This clears for a "SPECIAL FEATURES" title card, which then reduces to just "FEATURES" with receding 3D blocks. Finally, the video showcases a white and grey appliance; the word "ENHANCE" appears on its casing near a glowing blue light, before zooming in on the silver tap above the "Aquaguard" logo on a black panel.

samples.output: <think>The angled, blocky 3D text "SMART AUTO SHUT-OFF" transforms into a flat, white 2D font. The letters align centrally against the blue background, losing their depth and perspective tilt to rest as a static, clean title card.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: Describe the sequence of product displays and text overlays shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins with scattered white 3D letters assembling into a logo against a blue gradient. Next, similar block letters form a large number six beside the word "STAGE." Finally, the scene shifts to pale, spiky spherical models and a large organism floating in light blue space. The text "PROTOZOA" appears in bold, dark blue capital letters near the top left, labeling these microscopic entities as they suspend and drift within the environment.

Following the Protozoa sequence, the microscopic scene vanishes, replaced by a dark blue gradient background. White text then assembles vertically in the center, displaying "PROTECTION FROM" in small capitals, followed by "NEW AGE" in a larger font, and concluding with "CONTAMINANTS" in the largest bold capitals at the bottom.

Following the contaminant text, large white 3D letters spelling "LEAD" dominate the foreground amidst floating grey metallic rock fragments. The previous message fades into the background behind this new typography. A reflection of the word "LEAD" is visible below on a glossy surface, while the scene maintains its blue gradient backdrop as these heavy, industrial-looking elements assemble to conclude the sequence.

After the lead sequence, the text changes to "PESTICIDES," accompanied by a pink and green worm-like model and dark pill-shaped objects. Finally, the scene shifts to display the word "ARSNIC" flanked by rough mineral chunks, one pinkish and one blue-grey. Both final segments feature reversed text reflections on a glossy surface against the consistent blue gradient background, concluding the visual presentation.

Following the arsenic sequence, the text shifts to "MERCURY" beside a dark jagged rock and yellow spiky sphere. This clears for a "SPECIAL FEATURES" title card, which then reduces to just "FEATURES" with receding 3D blocks. Finally, the video showcases a white and grey appliance; the word "ENHANCE" appears on its casing near a glowing blue light, before zooming in on the silver tap above the "Aquaguard" logo on a black panel.

White cylindrical filters and dark casing parts are separated horizontally across the blue background. Thin white dotted lines connect the separated sections, illustrating the internal assembly structure of the filtration system.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: Describe the sequence of product displays and text overlays shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins with scattered white 3D letters assembling into a logo against a blue gradient. Next, similar block letters form a large number six beside the word "STAGE." Finally, the scene shifts to pale, spiky spherical models and a large organism floating in light blue space. The text "PROTOZOA" appears in bold, dark blue capital letters near the top left, labeling these microscopic entities as they suspend and drift within the environment.

Following the Protozoa sequence, the microscopic scene vanishes, replaced by a dark blue gradient background. White text then assembles vertically in the center, displaying "PROTECTION FROM" in small capitals, followed by "NEW AGE" in a larger font, and concluding with "CONTAMINANTS" in the largest bold capitals at the bottom.

Following the contaminant text, large white 3D letters spelling "LEAD" dominate the foreground amidst floating grey metallic rock fragments. The previous message fades into the background behind this new typography. A reflection of the word "LEAD" is visible below on a glossy surface, while the scene maintains its blue gradient backdrop as these heavy, industrial-looking elements assemble to conclude the sequence.

After the lead sequence, the text changes to "PESTICIDES," accompanied by a pink and green worm-like model and dark pill-shaped objects. Finally, the scene shifts to display the word "ARSNIC" flanked by rough mineral chunks, one pinkish and one blue-grey. Both final segments feature reversed text reflections on a glossy surface against the consistent blue gradient background, concluding the visual presentation.

Following the arsenic sequence, the text shifts to "MERCURY" beside a dark jagged rock and yellow spiky sphere. This clears for a "SPECIAL FEATURES" title card, which then reduces to just "FEATURES" with receding 3D blocks. Finally, the video showcases a white and grey appliance; the word "ENHANCE" appears on its casing near a glowing blue light, before zooming in on the silver tap above the "Aquaguard" logo on a black panel.

Following the feature introduction, the camera zooms out to reveal the full water purifier centered against a blue background. Text overlays reading "USER FRIENDLY" and "LED AND BUZZER INDICATIONS" appear briefly before disappearing. The view then zooms in on the lower section, highlighting the silver tap and the "Aquaguard" text on the dark grey drip tray. Finally, the camera pulls back again to display the entire appliance, clearly showing the translucent tank with measurement lines and the "ENHANCE" logo near the top.

The small circular indicator light situated to the right of the tap changes color, transitioning from a bright blue glow to a white ring against the dark grey body of the appliance.</think><answer>8</answer>

The text "PROTOZOA" appears in bold, dark blue capital letters near the top left, labeling these microscopic entities as they suspend and drift within the environment.

Following the Protozoa sequence, the microscopic scene vanishes, replaced by a dark blue gradient background. White text then assembles vertically in the center, displaying "PROTECTION FROM" in small capitals, followed by "NEW AGE" in a larger font, and concluding with "CONTAMINANTS" in the largest bold capitals at the bottom.

Following the contaminant text, large white 3D letters spelling "LEAD" dominate the foreground amidst floating grey metallic rock fragments. The previous message fades into the background behind this new typography. A reflection of the word "LEAD" is visible below on a glossy surface, while the scene maintains its blue gradient backdrop as these heavy, industrial-looking elements assemble to conclude the sequence.

After the lead sequence, the text changes to "PESTICIDES," accompanied by a pink and green worm-like model and dark pill-shaped objects. Finally, the scene shifts to display the word "ARSNIC" flanked by rough mineral chunks, one pinkish and one blue-grey. Both final segments feature reversed text reflections on a glossy surface against the consistent blue gradient background, concluding the visual presentation.

Following the arsenic sequence, the text shifts to "MERCURY" beside a dark jagged rock and yellow spiky sphere. This clears for a "SPECIAL FEATURES" title card, which then reduces to just "FEATURES" with receding 3D blocks. Finally, the video showcases a white and grey appliance; the word "ENHANCE" appears on its casing near a glowing blue light, before zooming in on the silver tap above the "Aquaguard" logo on a black panel.

Following the feature introduction, the camera zooms out to reveal the full water purifier centered against a blue background. Text overlays reading "USER FRIENDLY" and "LED AND BUZZER INDICATIONS" appear briefly before disappearing. The view then zooms in on the lower section, highlighting the silver tap and the "Aquaguard" text on the dark grey drip tray. Finally, the camera pulls back again to display the entire appliance, clearly showing the translucent tank with measurement lines and the "ENHANCE" logo near the top.

queries.question: How many litres are visible in the text?

samples.output: <think>The lineup of diverse water purifier units and the overhead brand logo fade away entirely. The visual field clears to reveal only a smooth, dark blue gradient background illuminated by a soft, white light source at the top center.</think><answer></answer>

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] Scattered white 3D letters rapidly assemble against a blue gradient background to form the logo "AQUAGUARD ENHANCE UV," which then remains stationary with a shimmering lens flare. [4-10] The scene transitions to a white and dark grey water purifier labeled "ENHANCE" on the upper casing. The camera zooms out from a side angle to a centered frontal view, revealing a translucent tank with white measurement lines and a white dispensing tap at the bottom. [10-12] The appliance vanishes, replaced by floating white 3D blocks above the centered text "WATER PURIFICATION SYSTEM."

recent_thinks: [12-14] Scattered white 3D block letters rapidly assemble to form a large number six on the left side. The word STAGE appears adjacent to it in bold white capitals. Below, the text WATER PURIFICATION SYSTEM aligns centrally. The complete phrase 6 STAGE WATER PURIFICATION SYSTEM rests statically against the blue gradient background.

[14-16] The previous text vanishes. White capital letters reading ENSURES YOUR DRINKING WATER appear on the left side. Simultaneously, a transparent glass filled with clear liquid and bubbles materializes on the right side against the blue gradient background.

[16-18] The glass of water on the right and the text ENSURES YOUR DRINKING WATER on the left remain visible. Below the existing text on the left side, the word SAFE appears in large, bold, white capital letters, completing the message against the blue gradient background.

[18-20] The large white word SAFE below the main text is replaced by PURE, and subsequently by the reversed word CRYSTAL. The text ENSURES YOUR DRINKING WATER remains on the left, and the glass of clear liquid with bubbles stays stationary on the right against the blue background.

[20-22] The reversed word CRYSTAL flips to face forward, joined by CLEAR appearing beneath it in large white letters. The glass of liquid on the right remains still. Finally, the bold text CRYSTAL CLEAR begins to fade, turning semi-transparent against the blue background.

input.user_input: What is the primary color of the water dispenser's outer casing shown in the video? A. Blue B. Grey C. White D. Silver

samples.output: <think>The previous text and glass vanish, replaced by a light blue background with floating particles. In the center, a spiky, white 3D spherical model resembling a microorganism materializes. Above this object, the word BACTERIA is displayed in dark blue capital letters.</think><answer>C</answer>

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

The camera zooms out from a side angle to a centered frontal view, revealing a translucent tank with white measurement lines and a white dispensing tap at the bottom. [22-26] Scene shifts to light blue background with floating particles. A spiky, white 3D spherical microorganism model materializes center. "BACTERIA" appears above in dark blue capitals. This disappears,

queries.question: What entities are present and what are they doing?

answers.text: The video displays scattered white 3D letters assembling into logos and titles like "STAGE" and "SPECIAL FEATURES." A virus model vanishes, replaced by spiky spheres and a large organism. The text "MERCURY" appears beside a dark jagged rock fragment and a yellow spiky sphere against a blue gradient. Finally, the scene shifts to a white and grey appliance labeled "ENHANCE" and "Aquaguard," highlighting its dispensing tap and glowing blue indicator light.
